title: Simple RTP
description: A lightweight and fully configurable plugin for RTP
body:
Simple Minecraft plugin that teleports players to a random location within a radius

❇️​ This plugin belongs to the [Simple Plugins](https://modrinth.com/collection/NkfcCoA2) collection, check out other similar and compatible plugins here

## Features

- **/rtp command that teleports a user randomly**
  - Within a customizable perimeter (from the center or player position)
  - **You can make the command usable only once**
- **World filter:** limits in which worlds the user can use the command
  - If disabled (default): the user can use it in all worlds
  - If enabled: the user can only do so in the worlds defined in the config
- **Add a configurable sound when the user teleports** (optional)
- **Cost to use the command** (optional) _(requires Vault)_
- Configurable radius and cooldown
- Configurable prefix for all plugin messages

## Commands

- **/rtp** Randomly teleports the user
- **/rtp `username`** Randomly teleports the target user
- **/srtp reload** Reloads the plugin configuration

## Permissions

- **srtp.rtp**: Allows the user to use the RTP command
- **srtp.rtp.once**: Allows the user to execute the RTP command **only once**
- **srtp.rtp.others:** Allows the user to use the /rtp `user` command
- **srtp.toggle**: Enables the user to use the /rtp reload command

## Configuration & Requirements

For more information on configuration and requirements, [visit the plugin GitHub](https://github.com/sardidefcon/simple-rtp) page
